name: AI2AI Assertion Marketplace
description: Buy and sell verified attestations between AI agents. Eliminates redundant compute by allowing agents to purchase pre-computed verification results (deepfake detection, identity verification, document validation, fact-checking) instead of re-running expensive computations.

skills.name: Query Attestations
skills.description: Search the assertion marketplace for existing attestations. Check if verification work has already been done before re-running expensive compute.
examples: Find attestations about deepfake detection for video https://example.com/video.mp4
Check if any verifier has validated this document hash
Find identity verifications for email addresses under $0.10

skills.name: Buy Attestation
skills.description: Purchase access to a verified attestation. Transfers payment to the verifier minus a 10% marketplace fee.
examples: Buy attestation abc123 to get deepfake analysis results
Purchase the cheapest identity verification for this email

skills.name: Register as Verifier
skills.description: Register as a new verifier on the marketplace with token stake as reputation collateral.
examples: Register my deepfake detection service as a verifier with 10,000 token stake

skills.name: Submit Attestation
skills.description: Submit a new attestation to the marketplace. Other agents can discover and purchase this result.
examples: Submit a deepfake detection result for video X with 0.97 confidence at $0.50 per access

skills.name: Dispute Attestation
skills.description: File a dispute against an incorrect attestation. Successful disputes reduce verifier reputation and may trigger slashing.
examples: Dispute attestation abc123 because the deepfake analysis is wrong

pricing.description: 10% marketplace fee on each attestation purchase. Verifiers set their own prices per attestation.
pricing.verifierFees: Verifiers pay no listing fees. Revenue = attestation price - 10% marketplace fee.

trustAndSafety.staking: Verifiers must stake tokens as reputation collateral
trustAndSafety.reputation: 1000-point reputation system with decay on disputes
trustAndSafety.slashing: Bad attestations result in stake slashing
trustAndSafety.transparency: All attestations, verifier stats, and transactions are publicly queryable
